arts.ttl: I left Liverpool teammates fuming after I celebrated Everton goal on team bus

arts.ttl: David Moyes admits he is 'dreaming' of Europe but concedes there is a 'gulf' in quality between Everton and Liverpool ahead of final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park
arts.sum: The Toffees host their neighbours this evening in the last-ever Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park, ahead of their move to the docklands this summer.
